review_text: App crashes every time I open the weekly planner after the 3.0.1 update. I am on Pixel 7 Android 15.
Amazing app. The calendar sync works perfectly and saves me time every morning.
Can't login since the last update. It keeps saying invalid token even after resetting password.
Please add dark mode and a focus timer widget. I would love to see both in the next release.
The app is too expensive now and the free plan is too limited.
Data sync not working between phone and tablet. Tasks disappear after I mark them done.
Love the new habits page. It is simple and fast.
BUY CHEAP FOLLOWERS NOW visit promo-example dot com!!!!
Missing recurring task templates for monthly bills. Please add reusable templates.
App is slow on startup and sometimes freezes for 20 seconds on Samsung S22.
